Validated Clinical Outcomes

Patient Results – Before & After Treatments

Treatment results for acne scars, pigmentation, hair loss, laser hair removal and dermatosurgery procedures performed at Dr. Alam’s Skin Clinic.

Contact Clinic WhatsApp Us

Real Patient Results With Dermatology and Procedure Treatments

Every skin and hair condition is different, and treatment results vary depending on the condition, severity and number of treatment sessions. Our focus is on improving skin texture, reducing scars, controlling pigmentation, improving hair density and treating skin conditions using medical and procedural dermatology treatments.

Below are some treatment results from procedures and dermatology treatments performed at our clinic.

Note: Results vary from patient to patient depending on condition severity, skin type and treatment compliance. Successful outcomes are a partnership between the doctor’s expertise and the patient’s adherence to the treatment plan.

Active Control

Acne Treatment Results

Medical management of inflammatory acne to restore a clear skin surface.

Before
After
Conditions: Inflammatory Acne
Session: 4 sessions
Duration: 3 months
Before
After
Conditions: Severe Acne Control
Session: 5 sessions
Duration: 4 months
Before
After
Conditions: Grade IV Acne Control
Session: 6 sessions
Duration: 5 months
Before
After
Conditions: Inflammatory Control
Session: 4 sessions
Duration: 3 months
Texture Revision

Acne Scar Treatment Results

Improving architectural skin damage using fractional resurfacing and procedural combinations.

Before
After
Conditions: Rolling Scars
Session: 4 sessions (CO2 Laser)
Duration: 6 months
Before
After
Conditions: Acne Scar Treatment
Session: 5 sessions
Duration: 7 months
Before
After
Conditions: Combination Scars
Session: 6 sessions
Duration: 9 months
Tone Correction

After
Conditions: Hormonal Melasma
Session: 4 sessions
Duration: 4 months

After
Conditions: Freckles
Session: 3 sessions
Duration: 2 months

Session: 3 sessions
Duration: 2.5 months
Density Recovery

Evidence-based hair restoration using medical-grade GFC and PRP therapy protocols.

After
Conditions: Male Pattern Hair Loss
Session: 6 sessions (GFC)
Duration: 6 months
Before
After
Conditions: Crown Density Loss
Session: 6 sessions (PRP+GFC)
Duration: 5 months

Duration: 6 months

Conditions: Mole Excision
Session: Single Procedure
Duration: Immediate Result

After

Session: Single Radiofrequency
Duration: Healing In 7 Days

After

Hypertrophic Revision

Keloid / Scar Treatment Results

Advanced management of thick, elevated scarring through medical and procedural protocols.

Before
After
Conditions: Hypertrophic Keloid
Session: 4 sessions (Injections)
Duration: 4 months
Clinical Advisory

Why Treatment Results Take Time

Many dermatology and laser treatments require multiple sessions and results improve gradually over time. Acne scar treatments, pigmentation treatments, PRP therapy and laser hair removal require multiple sessions for significant improvement.

Consistency and adherence to the follow-up plan are fundamental to success.

Start Your Own Transformation

If you are struggling with acne scars, pigmentation, hair loss or any skin condition, book a consultation for a proper medical diagnosis.
